programme.desc: A young inmate with a big personality faces problems while four other inmates are in jail after a shocking home invasion robbery and rape; one defendant will stand apart from the others, though nothing will prepare him for what's to come.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids: Extended Stay
programme.desc: In Kent County Jail, a well-known inmate is back with more than 130 prior stays; an inside look at life in the one wing of the jail that inmates consider prime real estate, but where one will be expelled for good.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Stockbroker Jordan Belfort pleads guilty to fraud and does jail time; Belfort gets a Hollywood makeover.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: How multibillion-dollar company Pacific Gas & Electric comes to repeatedly kill its customers by putting profits over safety as alleged by critics.

programme.title: Lockup: Fairfax: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Emergency Response Team is deployed when a mentally ill inmate soils his cell and refuses orders; a vicious assault sends another inmate to the hospital; a fresh face joins the female unit, and finds herself in the middle of an investigation.

programme.title: Lockup: Fairfax: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A new inmate struggles with life on the tough side of the jail; another inmate is offered a chance to improve his condition but mounts a defense anyway; a female inmate requires some special attention from staff members.

programme.title: Lockup: Fairfax: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A gang member with a violent past and a long disciplinary record in jail tries to convince staff he's changed; another inmate, once a victim of prison rape, lobbies to do his time in isolation.

programme.title: Lockup: Fairfax: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The communities in Fairfax County, Virginia, have become some of the wealthiest and fastest growing in the nation, due in part to low crime rates, and, as one deputy says, taking care of the "little things" so "you don't have the big things."

programme.title: Lockup: Fairfax: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A self-described white supremacist may not be who he says he is and that could make him a marked man among other white supremacists; another inmate attempts to hide the true nature of his recent conviction.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A violent gang member asks to move back to general population, following six years in segregation; a brother and sister are charged with murdering a high school football star, two years after he was stabbed to death on an Oakland street corner.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion impresses Tim Medhurst by reaching full throttle in the car and, while he scales a 500-foot cliff, she climbs a wardrobe. Will either of them reach dizzy heights at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Our antiques experts go equestrian in the New Forest. After an encounter with some wild ponies, Christina Trevanion turns farrier while Tim Medhurst buys a horse hoping to gallop after her.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Tim Medhurst's last chance to get the better of Christina Trevanion. Will a 400-year-old shilling be enough to do it in today's money? Or will Christina's rubies be worth a king's ransom?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw start hunting for treasure in the Sherwood Forest. Can Catherine's cold painted peacock attract higher bids that Paul's porcelain God of Mars?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw plus their sporty little roadster, browse around the River Severn. But who'll be victorious at that auction in Newport, Shropshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw hit the shops, journeying from Wrexham to the Black Country in their little red sports car. But who'll prosper at the auction in Penkridge?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw take their little roadster to Birmingham. Catherine finds a top-secret hidey-hole and Paul ends up on a canal barge. It's an auction to remember.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trippers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw browse around Worcestershire. But who will be victorious at the deciding auction? Expect French games and Japanese vases.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine brave the snow from Northumberland to Edinburgh in their '66 Mustang. But will a lavatorial purchase leave them feeling flush after the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the second leg of this trip with experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine heading down the west coast from Cumbria to Liverpool. Some weighty buys and a couple of pies.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a tale of two cities for experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine as they scour the shops of Liverpool and Manchester for old treasures. Expect pots, kettles and a spot of culture.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: We meander through the Midlands with James Braxton and Roo Irvine. On the lookout for really old things, they reveal hidden talents and discover scary shops.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The last leg of the trip with experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine, as James joins the circus and Roo faces her biggest fear. Can they find enough treasures to take to the final auction in York?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old hand Philip Serrell takes novice tripper Louise Gostelow on an antiques hunt around East Anglia. Phil pesters a fisherman while Lou falls for a blue chicken.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts gather for an al fresco day in the gardens of Knebworth House in Hertfordshire. Featured items include a diamond brooch, a marine chronometer, a bronze Spirit of Ecstasy.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Knebworth House in Hertfordshire, Michael introduces unseen finds from previous Roadshows and talks to Clive Farahar. Finds include a pair of female figures, an unusual table clock with a floating turtle, a chemist's mortar, and a Victorian toilet.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Birmingham and find a Victorian painting, a telescope, an early 19th-century wooden ark, and a small pottery Turk's head, which turns out to be the most valuable piece of English pottery ever found at a Roadshow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts are at Cliveden in Buckinghamshire to examine a valuable collection of jewelry found in a rubbish tip, a Stanley Spencer sketch of the owner's father, a brooch, and a silver beaker. Michael also makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts return to Cliveden's gardens in Buckinghamshire and discover a ladies bureau, an 'eccentrically large' barometer, an unusual 'McMickey' Mouse, and a silver cruet set made by one of the great silversmiths, worth £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts travel north to Lochgilphead in Argyll and Bute. Among the finds are a valuable painting, a pair of Staffordshire zebras, a painting of a young girl by Scottish artist Hamilton McKenzie, and a carved bone ship.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael takes the experts to Salford near Manchester and discovers an album full of valuable photographs, Zulu wedding beads accompanied by some rare photos, an American scrimshaw whale's tooth, and a drawing by the local artist LS Lowry.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team are at the turrets and terraces of Eastnor Castle in Herefordshire, where they find some bizarre objects including a wooden bicycle, a huge pocket knife, an embroidered egg, a World War I pack, and the first All Blacks rugby shirt.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team return to Eastnor Castle in Herefordshire with expert Paul Atterbury. Exciting finds include a 17th-century wine bottle, suffragette memorabilia, a bust of General Gordon, and a much-loved Victorian dressing case.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Eston, Cleveland, where they find a sculpted elephant by Eduardo Paolozzi, a Victorian painting, the first commercially produced toy robot, a collection of craft jewelry, and a fiber-glass chair.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Melksham, Wiltshire. Among the items are a Cossack dagger, a drawing by Edmund Dulac, a dog collar made in 1784, and a collection of bedpans and a gold box found in the mud in Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Caernarfon in North Wales and examine a stunning 17th-century lantern clock, a set of chairs, a jade necklace, and a 200-year-old bleeding bowl.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Rugby, Warwickshire, where the finds include a collection of suffragette material, a signed Rolling Stones album, a post box from Penny Lane in Liverpool, and a Turkish rifle with Greek inscriptions.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and Paul Atterbury return to London's Victoria and Albert Museum to showcase previously unseen sequences from other roadshows, including a collection of Winston Churchill mementos, and an album of Spanish watercolors.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: How naturalists find out that some eels are electric is revealed.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on the wood frog, which freezes solid; he looks at how the emperor penguin breeds.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Nature produces two unique mechanisms of natural construction; weaving in birds and silk fascinate scientists.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough shines the spotlight on female hyenas; he examines why male seahorses give birth.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Examining how swallows appear each spring; Insects, such as butterflies, suddenly arrive in the summer.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines how fleas jump; he tracks the true speed of a cheetah.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines orangutans and crows, two unusual animals that use tools.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated people for centuries; he looks at the expandable bodies of anacondas and camels.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at some species with unusual styles of consuming food, including the gigantic blue whales and the flamboyant flamingos.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines some species with remarkable healing properties.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at the incredible animals who can regenerate entire parts of their bodies, like salamanders and deer.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines bizarre and deadly hybrid animals.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines animals with the ability to find their way.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines the sizes of animals' young.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough discovers if animals and plants can count.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough investigates two shells that win at evolution.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores animals with fighting behavior.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: A look at the archeological history of these volcanic islands and how numerous unusual species originated there.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Many of Charles Darwin's theories on evolution were based on his observations in the Galapagos.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: A glimpse into what the future holds for the Galapagos as man and ocean currents have brought change to the islands.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Untouched since the dawn of time, evolution runs riot in New Zealand to create some of the rarest and most unusual wildlife on Earth.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Male sea lions brawl for mating rights and females give birth on a sandy beach in the Auckland Islands, located halfway between New Zealand and Antarctica.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Four penguin species begin breeding every winter in four very different and rugged locations on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein's long weekends across Europe come to a conclusion in the city of Palermo.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers head to Kristiansund on the coast of Norway to meet specialist artisan bakers.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: Dave and Si journey through the Netherlands, where they bake lazybones buns beside a windmill.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The guys travel from the wine region of the Rhine Valley to the spiritual home of beer, Bavaria, and discover Germany's passion for bread of every shape, size and flavor.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers travel to the furthest corners of Europe, culminating in a fun family party thrown by Dave's Romanian wife, Lil.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The bikers tour the home of Mozart and Arnold Schwarzenegger, starting in the patisserie capital of the world, Vienna.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The bikers abandon their bikes in favor of gondolas and cook up focaccia, stromboli and eat a pasta pie on the back streets of Ferrara.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: The death of Edward VII in 1910 rocks Sandringham and the royals; the privately-owned house was inherited by Edward VII's wife, Alexandra; how the abdication crisis threw the very future of the house into question.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: A look at 1952, when tragedy struck as King George VI died in his sleep, discovering what happened as the new Queen began her reign.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Berkley Castle, Caerphilly Castle and Nottingham Castle all played a part in the fate of Edward II.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visits to Ludlow Castle in England and Wales' Carew and Pembroke castles.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visiting castles of the Loire Valley of France to relive the triumph and death of Joan of Arc.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Hugo de Burgh spends time as both master and prisoner of castles.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: During medieval times, castles served as the military headquarters dominating the surrounding countryside. These important strategic strongholds were built on high ground, surrounded by a deep moat and had heavily fortified walls.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visiting the Bran, Targoviste and Sangov castles of Vladd III, known as Vlad the Impaler.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: The fall of Chateau Gulliard; Caerphilly Castle is defeated by a con man.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: A look at castles where torture was the norm.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Pembroke Castle's clever strategy to overcome a lengthy siege.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Edward I built a trail of castles in Wales to intimidate the Welsh.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Ediburgh Castle; Stirling Castle; Glames Castle.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Tintagel Castle evidence suggests King Arthur more than a myth; treasure hidden at Rennes-le-Chateau in France.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: The castles that housed Mary Queen of Scots.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Captive princes; a prisoner's revenge; the diary of Ann Askew.

programme.title: Castles of Horror

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George takes on an Edwardian home suffering from an extreme case of 1970s wall-to-wall paneling; he also tackles a mock Tudor cottage in Hastings.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.title: Dr. Phil

When Lester's supposedly wealthy friend mysteriously accepts work as the building handyman, Mary sets out reveal his real motive and accidentally unveils more than one skeleton harbored in his 'closet.'

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS vincula una extraña escena del crimen en el Cementerio Nacional de Arlington con una serie de ataques contra veteranos sin hogar.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga a la cabo de la Marina Laney Alimonte (Camryn Grimes) después de que la evidencia sugiere que asesinó a su vecina mientras un hipnoterapeuta la trataba por insomnio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El hijo de un suboficial es encontrado asesinado en su fiesta de “bienvenida a casa desde la prisión”. Las evidencias indican que el mejor amigo de toda la vida de Kasie, Dante Brown (Devale Ellis), es el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Las cosas se vuelven personales para Danny cuando Luis Delgado, el sicario del cartel de la droga responsable de incendiar su casa, reaparece.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin y Frank se enfrentan sobre la nueva legislación de la oficina del fiscal que socava las políticas de Frank.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de policías siendo acosados por un grupo de personas en un complejo residencial, Frank ordena una redada para arrestar a cualquiera con una orden pendiente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Verdad o consecuencias
programme.desc: Mientras comienza la búsqueda del sustituto de Ziva, Gibbs y los miembros restantes de su equipo deben volver al trabajo con el pasado todavía pesando en sus mentes.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/24/2019. In a devastating defeat, Nixon lost one of the closest presidential elections in US history to JFK. In 1968, Nixon sensed an opportunity for a comeback.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 04/07/2019. After a great political comeback, Nixon realized his survival hinged on a key promise: to end the Vietnam War. The president suspects a conspiracy against him.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2019. Nixon was re-elected in a landslide, but shortly into his second term, the cover-up of a DNC Headquarters break-in at the Watergate complex began to fall apart.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/17/2019. Raised by a family with modest means in a childhood beset by tragedy, Nixon learned early to recognize opportunity where he could and how to seize it.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/24/2019. In a devastating defeat, Nixon lost one of the closest presidential elections in US history to JFK. In 1968, Nixon sensed an opportunity for a comeback.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/14/2021. Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples. Stanley embarks on a whirlwind tour to find the freshest mozzarella and the best San Marzano tomatoes, and enjoys a spectacular spaghetti and zucchini.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/26/2016. A Defense Intelligence Agency interrogator and U.S Special Forces work together to find missing Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/03/2016. The Joint Special Operations Command needed to stop violent AQI leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi and put an end to his reign of terror.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/22/2016. Zamir Gotta upstages Anthony Bourdain on a tour of the country situated in the Caucasus, featuring food from Tbilisi, Batumi and Khurvaleti.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/29/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the West African nation with chef Pierre Thiam, journalist Ofeibea Quist-Arcton and famed musician Youssou N’Dour.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/5/2016. The famed Carnival celebration sets the tone for Anthony Bourdain’s visit to this city that boasts Kolsch, the raw minced pork dish mett and blood sausage.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/12/2016. Anthony Bourdain’s trip to this city renowned for its love of meat features a meal at the famed Don Carlos and an after-hours soccer match.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/20/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits the Johannesburg Suburb of Hillbrow, where he spends a day with a taxi driver while absorbing the culture and of course, food.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is apprehended after trying to evade arrest, a convicted felon is detained when police make some illegal discoveries in his van, and deputies seize a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing suspect claims to be a federal informant, officers inspect an erratically driven car and find a safe, and a familiar face swears this time she's going to rehab.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: While volunteering at a retirement home, Roz becomes convinced that she's "the angel of death" after her first two patients die on her.

programme.title: Carne de presidio

programme.title: La Mujer del Puerto
programme.desc: Rosario, una joven mujer, se ve abandonada después de la muerte de su padre y un engaño amoroso, y se convierte en una prostituta enigmática en Veracruz, allí busca a su hermano perdido y una noche con el marino Alberto revela un trágico destino.

programme.title: Hasta el viento tiene miedo
programme.desc: Tras un frustrado intento de suicidio, Claudia es internada en un singular centro de apoyo para adolescentes con problemas emocionales, regido por la inflexible psiquiatra Bernarda Alquicira.

programme.title: Dicen que soy Comunista
programme.desc: Benito es un viudo que trabaja en una humilde imprenta para mantener a su hijo. Cuando un dirigente comunista acude a su negocio y le propone unirse al partido, Benito se verá envuelto en alocados enredos.

programme.title: Carne de presidio
programme.desc: Pedro es declarado culpable de asesinato tras matar accidentalmente al esposo de una amiga. Mientras su familia enfrenta tiempos difíciles, él cometerá un grave error al confiar su libertad en la persona equivocada.

programme.title: Inmaculada
programme.desc: Una mujer cuya hija está a punto de lanzar su vida por el bien de un canalla. La mujer toma a su hija a un lado y le ruega que no cometa ese desastroso error. Para reforzar su argumento, nos cuenta su propia desgracia.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir su condena, un ex pistolero regresa a su ciudad planeando vivir una vida tranquila, sin embargo, los hijos de un hombre que mató tienen otros planes.

programme.title: Sin rastros
programme.desc: Unas vacaciones familiares toman un giro terrible cuando la hija de una pareja desaparece sin dejar rastro. A medida que crece la lista de sospechosos, la búsqueda por la verdad los lleva a descubrir algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli está hasta el cuello en un caso que puede conducirlo donde no quiere ir. Chazz Palminteri interpreta a Matt, abogado y amigo de Corelli. Linda Fiorentino es la esposa de Matt, Trina; una psicóloga capaz de todo incluso de asesinar.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Hombre caído
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf protagoniza a un veterano de guerra de la Marina de los EE. UU., quien regresa de Afganistán para encontrar un mundo completamente diferente, y busca desesperadamente a su esposa e hijo separados.

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran
programme.desc: Tom Cruise interpreta a un comerciante de ruedas egocéntrico que descubre que tiene un hermano autista (Dustin Hoffman) y lo lleva a un viaje inolvidable por todo el país en esta histérica, profunda y conmovedora ganadora del Oscar® a la Mejor Película.

programme.title: La niñera y el presidente
programme.desc: Una cosmetóloga de Nueva York, tomada por error como maestra de ciencia, recibe una propuesta de trabajo para darles clase a los hijos de un dictador de Europa Oriental.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Amor Letra Por Letra
programme.desc: Recién despedida, Hanna deposita por accidente su último cheque en la cuenta de banco de Edgar, un aspirante a escritor. Hanna se dispone a encontrar a Edgar, quien ya comenzó a gastar el dinero.

programme.title: Mátame suavemente
programme.desc: Al rojo vivo, Heather Graham (Boogie Nights) y Joseph Fiennes (Shakespeare in Love) como nunca antes, en esta odisea sexual acerca de los poderes adictivos y mortales de la pasión ilícita. Algo muy bueno puede resultar mortal.

programme.title: Casadas con el mismo hombre
programme.desc: El matrimonio de Mitch con Candy se basa en una mentira. Su familia cree que es un agente de la CIA, pero en realidad está con otra familia.

programme.title: Suficiente coraje
programme.desc: Un hombre exiliado en Venezuela vuelve a Chile para vengar la muerte de su padre, asesino durante la dictadura militar de los 70. En su búsqueda del hombre que ordenó la muerte de sus padres, conoce a una mujer que escapa de la crisis política.

programme.title: Mátame suavemente
programme.desc: Al rojo vivo, Heather Graham (Boogie Nights) y Joseph Fiennes (Shakespeare in Love) como nunca antes, en esta odisea sexual acerca de los poderes adictivos y mortales de la pasión ilícita. Algo muy bueno puede resultar mortal.

programme.title: No sin mi hija
programme.desc: Sally Field ofrece una interpretación electrizante en esta convincente historia real de Betty Mahmoody, una mujer estadounidense que, junto con su hija, queda atrapada en Irán, engañada por su marido al visitar su país natal.

programme.title: El gringo
programme.desc: "El hombre" cruza a México con $2,000,000 en efectivo y un plan para vivir lo que le queda en la playa, pero se queda atrapado en el pueblo "El Fronteras". Bajo ataque de policías corruptos, debe salvar "El Fronteras" a través de espectaculares tiroteos.

programme.title: El sustituto (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-marine goes undercover as a substitute teacher and discovers a gang is terrorizing the high school. As lives are threatened, he sets out to clean up the crime-infested school.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: En una tierra azotada por la plaga del siglo XXI, un hermoso Cyborg mitad humano tiene la información que puede salvar la civilización. ¡Pero solo la fortaleza y astucia de un guerrero solitario será capaz de salvar esos hechos importantes!

programme.title: Contacto sangriento
programme.desc: El maestro de Ninjutsu Frank Dux viaja a Hong Kong para participar en el Kumite, las olimpiadas de artes marciales, y conoce a una hermosa periodista estadounidense. Al poco tiempo deberá enfrentarse a Chong-Li, un despiadado maestro coreano de taekwondo.

programme.title: Sangre por sangre
programme.desc: El oficial John Kang sueña con una vida tranquila con su esposa e hija. Pero después de una operación fallida, su mundo se torna violento tras volverse el blanco de un posible asesinato a manos de un implacable jefe militar camboyano.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Cine en español
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: Una noche sin luna
programme.desc: Durante la víspera del Año Nuevo, tres personajes solitarios viajan a una pequeña ciudad perdida en el campo uruguayo y, a través de sus caminos, tendrán la oportunidad de cambiar sus destinos.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que había asesinado a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Viernes 13: El capítulo final
programme.desc: Después de su renacimiento en una morgue del hospital, el asesino de la máscara de hockey fija su atención vengativa en la familia Jarvis y un grupo de adolescentes hasta ahora despreocupados.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Esta vez parece haber puesto la mira en los pacientes jóvenes de una casa aislada. Y más de unos pocos de sus objetivos adolescentes terminan por la mitad, en cuartos ... lo que sea, Jason lo hace.

programme.title: Viernes 13 parte VI: Jason vive
programme.desc: De niño, Tommy Jarvis hizo algo que muchos murieron intentando hacer: mató a Jason Vorhees, el asesino que aterrorizó a Crystal Lake. Ahora, años después, Tommy está atormentado por el temor de que Jason siga vivo.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre
programme.desc: Desde que el maníaco homicida Jason Voorhees quedó atrapado en cadenas en el fondo de Crystal Lake, el campamento de verano cercano ha funcionado sin problemas ... sin asesinatos.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VIII: Jason invade Manhattan
programme.desc: La Gran Manzana está en grandes problemas, ya que el indestructible psicópata Jason Voorhees sale a la ciudad de Nueva York y pinta la ciudad de "rojo".

programme.title: Testigo
programme.desc: La viuda y madre de tres hijos, Annie Wilson, se gana la vida adivinando el futuro de los demás... a pesar de que el suyo se ha tornado más confuso de lo que ella misma puede ver.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: Del director George Clooney, Suburbicon es el lugar perfecto para Gardner Lodge (Matt Damon) y su familia. Pero esa tranquilidad oculta una realidad perturbadora, y Gardner deberá navegar por el submundo de traición, engaño y violencia de la ciudad.

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: Un sociópata se lía a cometer crímenes a diestro y siniestro en Miami y se enrolla con una prostituta confiada, mientras da esquinazo a un policía algo torpe.

programme.title: Pena ajena
programme.desc: Shaun, un surfer talentoso pero desenfocado, encuentra inspiración en la novela de Martin Skinner y deja Orange County para estudiar Arte Creativo en Stanford.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Outcasts
programme.desc: Dos mejores amigas y geeks de clase mundial superan una broma humillante de las chicas "cool".

programme.title: Mi suegra y yo
programme.desc: Historia que relata las dificultades por las que pasa una pareja recién casada cuando acepta la visita temporal de la suegra, quien tiene un carácter intenso y fuera de control, lo que pondrá en riesgo la unión matrimonial.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: This masterful story of a war-weary World War II veteran who must leave his family to fight again combines moving drama with surefire, bombs-away aerial action. Also starring Grace Kelly as his loving, luminescent wife.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Run Silent, Run Deep
programme.desc: The legendary Clark Gable and Burt Lancaster star in this gripping, classic military drama as a submarine commander (Gable) drives his men and his 1st officer (Lancaster) to the brink of mutiny in his quest to sink an enemy sub. Robert Wise directs.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: This masterful story of a war-weary World War II veteran who must leave his family to fight again combines moving drama with surefire, bombs-away aerial action. Also starring Grace Kelly as his loving, luminescent wife.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: In Harm's Way

programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Rhoda Nathan fue encontrada asesinada en una habitación de un hotel en Cincinnati.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1998, una actuación de asesinato misterioso en Maryland se convierte en una verdadera novela policíaca cuando se descubre el cuerpo gravemente quemado de Stephen Hricko en su habitación de hotel.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía obtiene una pista sobre una pareja que desapareció en el fin de semana del Día de los Caídos durante un robo en marcha. La evidencia que se encuentra resuelve el brutal crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Afición al veneno
programme.desc: Tres muertes aparentemente no relacionadas resultaron ser asesinatos en serie. El asesino había tenido cuidado: usó veneno que no tenía sabor ni olor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T-rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head to head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs

programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With Elyse back at work, Steven is frustrated when her schedule and the baby's schedule aren't allowing them any free time together.

programme.desc: Each couple is standing on the edge of the roof. Contestant will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants are driving behind a flatbed and their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A crane will be driving alongside the edge of a berth with its boom arm extended out over the berth. Contestants will start this stunt by jumping into garbage, retrieving items. 2 contestants will hold onto ski lines connected to the helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants support one another while leaning out over each side of a boat. Each contestant will be lying in a vertical position and rotated head over feet. Each contestant will be in a car and on go will back off the flatbed trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parents my make their way across the ledge of the Universal Orlando while their child stands on their shoulders. The mother son team must retrieve keys. Contestants are seated in a car and must and lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Five contestants will be seated in derby cars while their partners balance on top of 30-foot poles. The contestants will maneuver a swamp boat using a gondolier's staff through a swamp obstacle course.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire. One contestant will be placed in a Plexiglas box filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: One contestant will launch herself from a pneumatic chair off into the water. Couple will be placed together in a Plexiglas box with separated. One contestant will drop from a helicopter and swim over to a buoy with a key on it.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be hanging by their ankles from a crane above the water. Couples must sit inside a barrel in a kneeling position. Contestants are driving on a swervy course while trying to run through a series of barrels and wooden structures.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be dropped into the water. Couples will be presented with a picnic baskets filled with a Fear Factor style meal. One contestant will be underneath the train at the back of a car, while her partner will be on the side of the same car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are strapped to a line on the deck, with their bungees attached to a helicopter. Contestants will cut their way through two separate ropes. Contestants are connected to a helicopter and must repel down.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband, Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shaquita admits to cheating on Danny with Ashley to escape his abuse, but how will Ashley's man react? Then, Latasia and Mike vowed to stay off social media, but he claims she broke their promise with Facebook and a dating site account!

programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nye and her boyfriend spent last Easter with her family, but he spent most of it drinking and ignoring her until he left without a trace. Where was he that night? Plus, Jackie admitted to cheating on her boyfriend, but he believes there was more!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Courtney is here because he's trying to find out why his fiancée Jasmine has never allowed him to see his daughter in person. Then, Charlita knows that her husband has been cheating with their nanny Stephanie. He admits to cheating only once.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have 9 month old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kayla's madly in love with Levi, her baby's father, whom she's been dating for years. But this relationship is far from ordinary. A few months back, Kayla's 17-year-old sister accused Levi of taking advantage of her while sleeping.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle's boyfriend Ashley is too close to Tenielle's daughter! Latoya and the child's father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!

programme.desc: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.

programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While heading to the next island, Zou, Luffy's appetite causes them trouble and he and Bartolomeo find themselves entangled in the scheme of a pirate lord who can manipulate silver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tram-Man arrives! And has Luffy, Bartolomeo and Desire on the run! The deeper the three fall into the pit, however, the more clear it becomes that Bill's group hides a terrible secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's dire situation has become clear, but instead of rallying against Big Mom's crew, he submits to go along with them to bring an end to this situation. But being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hatches a plan to help Sanji, but he'll have to go alone to avoid an all-out war with Big Mom. Meanwhile, Kin'emon and Kanjuro finally arrive at Zou, unwittingly setting the stage for the Minks' thirst for revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Revelations abound as the true nature of the Wano clan and their relationship with the Minks is revealed! Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined! But even more shocking - the visage of Raizo the Ninja!

programme.desc: When a police officer goes missing, it becomes apparent he is the victim of a jealous wrath.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Shannon is convinced that her hoarding is caused by demons possessing her home. Ray's historic San Francisco Victorian home almost burnt down the block when his hoard caught on fire.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Linda's compulsive shopping not only depleted her family's finances, but filled every room in their home with piles of bags and boxes. Her husband left her three years ago when he could no longer cope with her hoarding.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Patty and David appear to be living the American dream. But their secret hides behind the manicured yard of their new home. Patty's hoarding has taken over the entire house and their children were removed by authorities.

programme.title: Every Day
programme.desc: Based on David Levithan’s novel, this charming romance tells the story of a 16-year-old girl (Angourie Rice) who falls in love with a spirit named A, a traveling soul who wakes each morning in a different body, living a different life... every day.

programme.title: Safety Not Guaranteed

programme.title: Farscape

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Atmosphere

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanoes, Indonesia is arguably the most active place on earth. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to some of Indonesia most remote and rarely visited volcanos.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanic folklore is reflected in Mexican history. One of their ancient legends tells the story of the Aztec warrior Popocatépetl - a giant active volcano - who erupts to wake his sleeping princess Iztaccíhuatl, a neighboring extinct ice capped volcano.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: In Indonesia we find regions where the air is so toxic that it's 40 times above human safe levels and sulphuric acid vents from the ground in dense yellowish clouds. Elsewhere, small volcanoes are so active, they are said to erupt every 15 minutes!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Col. Sheppard's team is urgently summoned to M1K-177, where Maj. Lorne's team has been attacked. When Sheppard and his unit arrive, however, all they find is a burned building containing charred bodies: presumably, Lorne and his men.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
